channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘I’m relieved she’s gone’: Fema staffers celebrate ousting of Kristi Noem
item.description: Current and former Fema staff say the fired DHS secretary made the US more dangerous by overhauling the agency Sign up for the Breaking News US email ...

item.title: Trump says Cuba is ‘going to fall pretty soon’ after White House comments – live
item.description: President tells CNN country is going to ‘fall’ after earlier in the week claiming Cuba ‘wants to make a deal so badly’ US lost 92,000 jobs in February...

item.title: David Copperfield announces last Vegas show, weeks after Epstein ties revealed
item.description: Lawyers for magician, who plans to unveil new project, said in 2024 he was ‘at most acquaintances’ with Epstein Sign up for the Breaking News US email...

item.title: Cyprus raises doubts about future of British bases on island after drone strike
item.description: Foreign minister wants ‘conversation’ about closing UK military sites following British government not warning of impending attack on RAF Akrotiri Mid...

item.title: Middle East crisis live: Israel bombs Tehran and Beirut as White House says campaign may take four to six weeks
item.description: Israel launched huge attacks on Iran and Lebanon overnight; Karoline Leavitt says Donald Trump will consider Iran to have surrendered once it no longe...

item.title: Three women interviewed on suspicion of sex trafficking in Al Fayed investigation
item.description: The women have been interviewed under suspicion of aiding and abetting rape and human trafficking, the Met Police says.

item.title: Tory peer quits after Lords investigation into PPE deals
item.description: It comes after a Lords standards probe into his contacts with ministers and advisers during the pandemic.

item.title: Meghan's lifestyle brand and Netflix end partnership
item.description: The Duchess of Sussex will run As ever independently, after a partnership with Netflix helped to launch the brand last year.

item.title: Fatbikes are wreaking havoc in Sydney's wealthy beach suburbs
item.description: Teens are infuriating locals by riding over golf courses and doing wheelies on the Harbour Bridge.

item.title: Mexico to deploy 100,000 security personnel for World Cup
item.description: World Cup co-hosts Mexico plan to deploy nearly 100,000 security personnel to protect fans at this summer's tournament, amid ongoing cartel violence i...
